mapper.select: SELECT a.appointment_id, a.customer_id, a.staff_id, a.service_id, a.appointment_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.end_datetime, a.total_duration, a.total_days, a.billing_type, a.service_address, a.special_requirements, a.status, a.total_amount, a.create_time, a.update_time, s.service_name, st.name AS staff_name, p.payment_status FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN service s ON a.service_id = s.service_id LEFT JOIN staff st ON a.staff_id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON a.appointment_id = p.appointment_id WHERE a.appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT a.appointment_id, a.customer_id, a.staff_id, a.service_id, a.appointment_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.end_datetime, a.total_duration, a.total_days, a.billing_type, a.service_address, a.special_requirements, a.status, a.total_amount, a.create_time, a.update_time, s.service_name, st.name AS staff_name, p.payment_status FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN service s ON a.service_id = s.service_id LEFT JOIN staff st ON a.staff_id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON a.appointment_id = p.appointment_id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.appointment_id, a.customer_id, a.staff_id, a.service_id, a.appointment_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.end_datetime, a.total_duration, a.total_days, a.billing_type, a.service_address, a.special_requirements, a.status, a.total_amount, a.create_time, a.update_time, s.service_name, st.name AS staff_name, p.payment_status FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN service s ON a.service_id = s.service_id LEFT JOIN staff st ON a.staff_id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON a.appointment_id = p.appointment_id WHERE a.staff_id = #{staffId} ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, a.start_time DESC

SELECT appointment_id, customer_id, staff_id, service_id, appointment_date, start_time, end_time, end_datetime, total_duration, total_days, billing_type, service_address, special_requirements, status, total_amount, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE staff_id = #{staffId} AND status IN (0, 1, 2) AND (
(appointment_date = #{appointmentDate} AND (end_datetime IS NULL OR DATE(end_datetime) = appointment_date) AND start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) OR
(end_datetime IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMP(appointment_date, start_time) < TIMESTAMP(#{appointmentDate}, #{endTime}) AND end_datetime > TIMESTAMP(#{appointmentDate}, #{startTime})) OR
(end_datetime IS NOT NULL AND appointment_date <= #{appointmentDate} AND end_datetime > TIMESTAMP(#{appointmentDate}, #{startTime})) )
AND appointment_id <> #{excludeAppointmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment ( customer_id, staff_id, service_id, appointment_date, start_time, end_time, end_datetime, total_duration, total_days, billing_type, service_address, special_requirements, status, total_amount ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{staffId}, #{serviceId}, #{appointmentDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{endDatetime}, #{totalDuration}, #{totalDays}, #{billingType}, #{serviceAddress}, #{specialRequirements}, #{status}, #{totalAmount} )
mapper.select:
SELECT appointment_id, customer_id, staff_id, service_id, appointment_date, start_time, end_time, end_datetime, total_duration, total_days, billing_type, service_address, special_requirements, status, total_amount, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE status = 1 AND (
(end_datetime IS NULL OR DATE(end_datetime) = appointment_date) AND TIMESTAMP(appointment_date, start_time) <= NOW() OR
(end_datetime IS NOT NULL AND DATE(end_datetime) != appointment_date) AND TIMESTAMP(appointment_date, start_time) <= NOW() )

SELECT appointment_id, customer_id, staff_id, service_id, appointment_date, start_time, end_time, end_datetime, total_duration, total_days, billing_type, service_address, special_requirements, status, total_amount, create_time, update_time FROM appointment WHERE status = 2 AND (
(end_datetime IS NULL OR DATE(end_datetime) = appointment_date) AND TIMESTAMP(appointment_date, end_time) <= NOW() OR
(end_datetime IS NOT NULL AND DATE(end_datetime) != appointment_date) AND end_datetime <= NOW() )

SELECT a.appointment_id, a.customer_id, a.staff_id, a.service_id, a.appointment_date, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.end_datetime, a.total_duration, a.total_days, a.billing_type, a.service_address, a.special_requirements, a.status, a.total_amount, a.create_time, a.update_time FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN payment p ON a.appointment_id = p.appointment_id WHERE (a.status = 0 OR a.status = 1) AND (p.payment_status IS NULL OR p.payment_status = 0) AND TIMESTAMPADD(MINUTE, 10, a.create_time) <= NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM appointment WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
